events.event: First sand mining permit in Kempen (Van Eetvelde), per Sibelco corporate history.
SCR (Sablières et Carrières Réunies) incorporated — foundation of Sibelco lineage.
Dredging mills introduced in Campine sand operations (Belga/Sibelco narrative).
Emsens family acquires large landholdings in Lommel for silica extraction.
SCR drying/grinding plant at Dessel; 'Sibelco' product branding (corporate history).
Kristal Solar Park (99.5 MW ground PV) commissioned at Kristalpark III, Lommel.
Floating PV (~7 MWp) at Sibelco De Schans quarry, Mol/Dessel — separate site from Kristal.
